mapper.select: SELECT * FROM item WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM item WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO item (name, category, spec, standard_weight, use_type, warning_quantity, max_quantity, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{name}, #{category}, #{spec}, #{standardWeight}, #{useType}, #{warningQuantity}, #{maxQuantity}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, COALESCE(#{deleted}, 0))
mapper.update: UPDATE item SET name = #{name}, category = #{category}, spec = #{spec}, standard_weight = #{standardWeight}, use_type = #{useType}, warning_quantity = #{warningQuantity}, max_quantity = #{maxQuantity}, created_at = #{createdAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT i.id, i.name, i.category, i.spec, i.use_type, COALESCE(s.quantity, 0) AS stock, c.cabinet_no, cs.slot_no FROM item i INNER JOIN cabinet_slot cs ON cs.item_id = i.id AND cs.deleted = 0 INNER JOIN cabinet c ON c.id = cs.cabinet_id AND c.deleted = 0 AND c.status = 1 LEFT JOIN item_stock s ON s.item_id = i.id AND s.deleted = 0 WHERE i.deleted = 0 ORDER BY i.name ASC, c.cabinet_no ASC, cs.slot_no ASC

SELECT i.id, i.name, i.category, i.spec, i.standard_weight, i.use_type, COALESCE(s.quantity, 0) AS quantity, COALESCE(s.borrowed_quantity, 0) AS borrowed_quantity, COALESCE(s.ledger_weight, 0) AS ledger_weight, COALESCE(s.actual_weight, 0) AS actual_weight, COALESCE(s.warning_quantity, i.warning_quantity, 0) AS warning_quantity, COALESCE(s.max_quantity, i.max_quantity, 0) AS max_quantity, COALESCE(s.stock_status, 0) AS stock_status, cs.cabinet_id, c.cabinet_no, c.name AS cabinet_name, cs.id AS slot_id, cs.slot_no, COALESCE(s.updated_at, i.updated_at) AS updated_at FROM item i LEFT JOIN item_stock s ON s.item_id = i.id AND s.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN cabinet_slot cs ON cs.item_id = i.id AND cs.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN cabinet c ON c.id = cs.cabinet_id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE i.deleted = 0 ORDER BY i.updated_at DESC
